items.title: Publishing a New Company SOP
items.summary: Draft, review, approve, publish, and schedule review dates for new standard operating procedures.

items.title: Updating the LLM Capability Dashboard
items.summary: Use verified sources, assign confidence, mark review status, and update the JSON data file.

items.title: New Staff AI Tool Orientation
items.summary: Intro path for when to use Codex, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity in daily company work.

items.title: SOP Writing and Review Basics
items.summary: Training sequence for writing clear SOPs with owners, versioning, and review cycles.

items.title: Add a Newsletter Text File
items.summary: Place a newsletter text file in incoming_newsletters so the future automation can parse it.

items.title: Review a Draft LLM Update
items.summary: Check source quality, verify claims, approve or reject the proposed dashboard change.

items.title: Which AI tool should I use first?
items.summary: Use Codex for build work, Claude for deep code reasoning, Gemini for Workspace-heavy planning, and Perplexity for source-backed research.

items.title: Can the dashboard update itself?
items.summary: Yes, but the recommended first version is semi-automated: AI drafts updates and a human approves them.

items.title: Company Knowledge Governance
items.summary: The hub is the source of truth only when pages include owners, review dates, and approval status.

items.title: AI Stack Operating Roles
items.summary: Defines the working role of each major AI system in CyplexAI's internal operations.
